description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a before_script that runs bundle install. Define a variable JEKYLL_ENV set to production. Add a test stage with a test job that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d test, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
